title: SqlClientAssemblyFixSettings
description: SqlClientAssemblyFixSettings: Initialisation settings for the SQL Toolkit ensuring that the correct Microsoft.Data.SqlClient assembly is loaded before any SQL component is used in Rhino 8. This is a fix until McNeel ships a working version of that dll.

InitialisationMethod.description: Method ran when the UI is loaded. This is in charge of loading the Microsoft.Data.SqlClient if we are in Rhino 8.

InitialisationAssembly.description: Assmbly where the initialisation method can be found.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
